metadata.description: Mergify CLI skills for stacked PRs, merge queues, CI insights, scheduled freezes, and configuration management

plugins.name: mergify-stack
plugins.description: Stacked PRs and Git workflow automation

plugins.name: mergify-merge-queue
plugins.description: Monitor, inspect, pause, and manage the Mergify merge queue

plugins.name: mergify-ci
plugins.description: CI insights: JUnit test results, git refs detection, scopes, and merge queue metadata

plugins.name: mergify-config
plugins.description: Validate and simulate Mergify configuration files

plugins.name: mergify-freeze
plugins.description: Create and manage scheduled merge freezes
